use std::fs::File;
use std::io;
use std::path::Path;

struct ConfigHandle {
    file: File,
}

impl Drop for ConfigHandle {
    fn drop(&mut self) {
        let _ = self.file.sync_all();
    }
}

fn open_config(path: &Path) -> io::Result<ConfigHandle> {
    let file = File::open(path)?;
    Ok(ConfigHandle { file })
}
